CustomField.description: If unsure, check with the applicant or local housing authority to verify eligibility. Tip: If the applicant is using Section 8 funds, enter the amount of the subsidy as a credit (negative number) in Other Monthly Housing Adjustment.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
If unsure, check with the applicant or local housing authority to verify eligibility.
Tip: If the applicant is using Section 8 funds, enter the amount of the subsidy as a credit (negative number) in Other Monthly Housing Adjustment.
CustomField.label: Receiving Section 8 Subsidy?
